pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.449) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Quality is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Engineering. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Engineering competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.449) and edge-domain placement (Data Quality) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Engineering. All passes support exclusion.
